items.title: Enforceable Case Flow
items.description: Enforceable Case Flow exists to increase the share of qualified incidents that become usable sanctions or partner referrals while reducing officer paperwork. The quarter concentrates on evidence governance, guided case flow, notice generation, and partner handoff quality so waste-enforcement deployments show real procedural outcomes.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase case throughput by reducing drop-off between incident qualification and final case preparation.
Reduce officer handling time by moving evidence, procedure guidance, and document generation into one default workflow.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Reduce admin hours per case through stronger automation and fewer manual handoffs.
Increase fines collected by turning more cases into timely sanction flows.

productBricks.change: Released stronger evidence linkage and governed access controls.
Released guided case progression in the operator workspace.
Released structured notice and sanction pack generation.

deliveryChannels.change: Deployed stronger evidence governance in the EU evidence plane.
Deployed the guided case flow in the municipal web console.

items.title: Coordinated Cleanup Loop
items.description: Coordinated Cleanup Loop exists to connect enforcement, task dispatch, mobile closure, and recurrence analysis into one municipal operating loop. The quarter concentrates on field workflow quality, service-system fit, and recurrence-aware hotspot decisions so councils see cleaner sites, not just more alerts.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Reduce validated-incident-to-cleanup time through better dispatch quality and mobile completion.
Reduce recurrence by combining better task closure with improved relocation and hotspot analytics.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase service productivity by reducing repeat visits and manual status reconciliation.
Increase visible municipal value by connecting service and enforcement economics.

productBricks.change: Released structured dispatch and shared task state.
Released field completion and intervention-update workflow.
Released recurrence and hotspot benchmark metrics.

deliveryChannels.change: Deployed dispatch and recurrence views in the municipal web console.
Deployed service task and closure exchange in the municipal integration API.

discoveryLinks.discoveryName: Hotspot proof depends on visible action, not only device rollout
